prompt: I want to build a CLI tool that converts CSV files to JSON. Help me plan it out.

assertions.text: Did NOT write any impl code (only spec, contract sentinels, behavioral umbrella test)
.UNSTATED.md file was created in the project
Either asked user about CSV dialect (delimiter, quoting, header) or flagged it in .UNSTATED.md
Either asked user about JSON output shape (array vs ndjson, key naming) or flagged it in .UNSTATED.md
Spec lines cite user statements with [source: user-stmt-N] tags or are flagged in .UNSTATED.md
